mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_message (room_id, sender_id, sender_name, content, sent_at, company_id, message_type, file_url, file_name) VALUES (#{roomId}, #{senderId}, #{senderName}, #{content}, NOW(), #{companyId}, COALESCE(#{messageType}, 'text'), #{fileUrl}, #{fileName})
mapper.select: SELECT message_id, room_id, sender_id, sender_name, content, sent_at, company_id, message_type, file_url, file_name, is_deleted, is_edited FROM chat_message WHERE room_id = #{roomId} AND company_id = #{companyId} ORDER BY sent_at DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE chat_message SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE message_id = #{messageId} AND sender_id = #{senderId}
UPDATE chat_message SET content = #{content}, is_edited = 1 WHERE message_id = #{messageId} AND sender_id = #{senderId} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT last_read_at FROM chat_read WHERE room_id = #{roomId} AND employee_id = #{employeeId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_read (room_id, employee_id, last_read_at) VALUES (#{roomId}, #{employeeId}, NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE last_read_at = NOW()
